rows.notes: Page number in upper-left corner. Crisp printed numeral, no amounts present.
Centered page year heading, fully legible, no monetary columns on this line.
Top-right heading 'Balance', clear and without amounts.
Section heading, centered below the year. No amounts on this line.

rows.description: Caution Money in hands of Coll.
rows.notes: Clear large pounds figure '10312' in pounds column and '15' in shillings; pence column blank interpreted as 0. Alignment confirmed by subtraction shown on the next row.
Clear figures '6251' / '5' / '3' aligned under the £ s d columns; horizontal subtraction line visible beneath these numerals.

Subtotal (result of the subtraction) printed at far right as '4061 9 9'. Alignment with the £ s d ruling lines is clear; verifies arithmetic with the two preceding rows (10312-6251 = 4061, 15s-5s with borrowing yields 9s 9d).
Underlined textual label introducing the following single-line item. No amounts on this descriptive line.

Pounds '163' clearly visible in the pounds column; shillings and pence columns are blank and interpreted as 0. The pence column is faint/blank but alignment with ruling lines supports interpretation as £163 0s 0d.
Section heading at left margin, clear and introduces the following grouped entries.
Sub-heading within Trust Funds; text legible, no monetary figures on this specific line.
Clear '137' / '16' / '6' in the £ s d columns for this entry; handwriting readily legible.
Clear reading '508 9 3' aligned to the £ s d columns.
Entry reads '53 18 11' in the £ s d columns; handwriting and alignment unambiguous.
Pounds '11' and shillings '3' are readable; pence column is blank and interpreted as 0. The name 'Michael' is somewhat abbreviated/uncertain in flourish but clear enough to record.
Clear numerals '49 2 1' in the monetary columns; description legible.
Clear '145 14 8' in columns; the initial and surname are clearly written.
Pounds '14' and shillings '11' readable; pence column blank (interpreted as 0). The surname reading 'Harker' is clear but could be an archaic spelling; confidence high.
Clear '102 3 7' in the £ s d columns and the label 'D. Richards Prize' legible.

Amount '73 13 4' clearly printed. The name appears as 'Shortridge Trust (Library)'; handwriting of the trust name is reasonably clear though the proper spelling of 'Shortridge' has moderate uncertainty.
Subtotal for Trust Funds printed at far right as '1085 10 6' beneath a horizontal rule. Alignment with £ s d ruling lines is clear and values are consistent with the listed items.
Left-margin section header, clear and introduces the next group of entries.
Numerals '443 18 6' are clear in the monetary columns; description legible.

Amounts '359 7 7' are clear. The descriptive text is somewhat stylized; read as 'Poor Rates Comp. Fund' (first word could be 'Poor' or 'Lower' depending on flourish). Chosen 'Poor' as most plausible reading given letter shapes.
Clear '1017 14 3' in the £ s d columns and the label 'Tuition Fund' is legible.
Numeric '94 6 2' clear. Description reads as 'Undergraduates Reading Rm' (abbreviated 'Rm'); the abbreviation is interpreted as 'Room'.

Figures '23 7 8' clear in the monetary columns. The fund label is written in a flowing script; read as 'Kitchen & Buttery' (other spellings possible such as 'Butlery' or 'Bursary'); description therefore given with moderate uncertainty.
Subtotal for Special Funds printed on the right as '1938 14 2' under a horizontal rule. Clear alignment and numerals.
Clear '5493 3 6' in the monetary columns. Description reads 'Balance from Gen Acct: II' (the abbreviation and roman numeral are legible).
Final grand total printed with a pound sign at left of the numerals as '£12741 17 11'. Clear alignment under the £ s d ruling lines and numerals unambiguous.

rows.description: I certify that the Accounts of the College are Abstracts & Balance Sheet contain a full & true
rows.notes: Certification sentence at bottom of page. Text is legible overall but some words and ampersand flourishes are faint; no monetary columns on this line.
